name: Support Ticket Triage
persona: Support team lead at a B2B SaaS company managing a high-volume ticket queue who needs a consistent urgency and routing signal before tickets reach an agent.
problem_statement: Support agents re-read full ticket text to determine urgency and routing category, producing inconsistent classifications at scale. There is no structured triage step between ticket submission and agent assignment.
artifact_type: CLI script that accepts a raw support ticket and returns a structured JSON triage brief with urgency score, category, KB topic, and one-sentence agent summary.
description: A CLI tool that classifies a support ticket into urgency, category, KB topic, and a one-sentence agent brief — output is structured JSON ready for routing
notes: W03 of the Customer Support Copilot monthly build. Triage layer sits between ticket intake (W01) and KB retrieval (W02). 5/5 offline evals passing after one prompt iteration.
